../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2898:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-agents-md-claude-md-protocol-md-v0-2-2-7-p0-omc-1-a-omc-coll-2026-05-30T08-24-49-394Z.md:760:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2929:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:875:+The most important design correction is to make `events.jsonl` the source of truth and treat `state.json` as a rebuildable cache. The second correction is to define one serialized write path for shared files using atomic filesystem operations. These two changes solve most concurrency, recovery, and duplicate-id issues without adding a service, daemon, database, or cross-provider hook.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2930:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:881:+This is a real issue, not just theoretical. The protocol says locks are advisory and says to use a lock when two agents might modify the same file, but it does not define an atomic acquisition operation, required write ordering, timeout, or validation step. If two agents append events and update state at the same time, `state.json` can point to the wrong event id, event ids can duplicate, and a later agent may silently build on corrupted state.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2931:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:958:+- If duplicate ids exist, do not renumber historical events by default. Append an `event_log_repair` event with details and mark `state.status = "needs_repair"` unless the user explicitly approves log surgery.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2932:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:974:+- If duplicate ids or malformed lines are detected, the agent MUST stop normal processing, preserve the original log, write a repair artifact, and set state status to `needs_repair`.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2939:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:1067:+If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed line or duplicate event id, normal collaboration MUST stop and `state.status` MUST be set to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely. A repair artifact MUST describe the malformed line, duplicate ids, proposed repair, and whether historical log rewriting is required.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2950:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:1282:+The most important design correction is to make `events.jsonl` the source of truth and treat `state.json` as a rebuildable cache. The second correction is to define one serialized write path for shared files using atomic filesystem operations. These two changes solve most concurrency, recovery, and duplicate-id issues without adding a service, daemon, database, or cross-provider hook.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2951:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:1288:+This is a real issue, not just theoretical. The protocol says locks are advisory and says to use a lock when two agents might modify the same file, but it does not define an atomic acquisition operation, required write ordering, timeout, or validation step. If two agents append events and update state at the same time, `state.json` can point to the wrong event id, event ids can duplicate, and a later agent may silently build on corrupted state.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2952:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:1365:+- If duplicate ids exist, do not renumber historical events by default. Append an `event_log_repair` event with details and mark `state.status = "needs_repair"` unless the user explicitly approves log surgery.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2953:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:1381:+- If duplicate ids or malformed lines are detected, the agent MUST stop normal processing, preserve the original log, write a repair artifact, and set state status to `needs_repair`.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2960:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:1474:+If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed line or duplicate event id, normal collaboration MUST stop and `state.status` MUST be set to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely. A repair artifact MUST describe the malformed line, duplicate ids, proposed repair, and whether historical log rewriting is required.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2975:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:1708:+The most important design correction is to make `events.jsonl` the source of truth and treat `state.json` as a rebuildable cache. The second correction is to define one serialized write path for shared files using atomic filesystem operations. These two changes solve most concurrency, recovery, and duplicate-id issues without adding a service, daemon, database, or cross-provider hook.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2976:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:1714:+This is a real issue, not just theoretical. The protocol says locks are advisory and says to use a lock when two agents might modify the same file, but it does not define an atomic acquisition operation, required write ordering, timeout, or validation step. If two agents append events and update state at the same time, `state.json` can point to the wrong event id, event ids can duplicate, and a later agent may silently build on corrupted state.

The protocol says locks are advisory and says to use a lock when two agents might modify the same file, but it does not define an atomic acquisition operation, required write ordering, timeout, or validation step. If two agents append events and update state at the same time, `state.json` can point to the wrong event id, event ids can duplicate, and a later agent may silently build on corrupted state.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:2999:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:2214:+- If duplicate ids exist, do not renumber historical events by default. Append an `event_log_repair` event with details and mark `state.status = "needs_repair"` unless the user explicitly approves log surgery.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3000:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:2230:+- If duplicate ids or malformed lines are detected, the agent MUST stop normal processing, preserve the original log, write a repair artifact, and set state status to `needs_repair`.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3007:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:2323:+If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed line or duplicate event id, normal collaboration MUST stop and `state.status` MUST be set to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely. A repair artifact MUST describe the malformed line, duplicate ids, proposed repair, and whether historical log rewriting is required.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3019:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:2588:+The most important design correction is to make `events.jsonl` the source of truth and treat `state.json` as a rebuildable cache. The second correction is to define one serialized write path for shared files using atomic filesystem operations. These two changes solve most concurrency, recovery, and duplicate-id issues without adding a service, daemon, database, or cross-provider hook.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3020:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:2594:+This is a real issue, not just theoretical. The protocol says locks are advisory and says to use a lock when two agents might modify the same file, but it does not define an atomic acquisition operation, required write ordering, timeout, or validation step. If two agents append events and update state at the same time, `state.json` can point to the wrong event id, event ids can duplicate, and a later agent may silently build on corrupted state.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3021:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:2671:+- If duplicate ids exist, do not renumber historical events by default. Append an `event_log_repair` event with details and mark `state.status = "needs_repair"` unless the user explicitly approves log surgery.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3022:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:2687:+- If duplicate ids or malformed lines are detected, the agent MUST stop normal processing, preserve the original log, write a repair artifact, and set state status to `needs_repair`.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3029:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-01-protocol-critical-r-2026-05-30T08-07-45-559Z.md:2780:+If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed line or duplicate event id, normal collaboration MUST stop and `state.status` MUST be set to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely. A repair artifact MUST describe the malformed line, duplicate ids, proposed repair, and whether historical log rewriting is required.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3055:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-2-minimal-invariant-tests-context-pha-2026-05-30T09-51-51-297Z.md:411:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3732:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3241:2. **reset语义风险。** `seed_data` 当前使用 `get_or_create`，不会更新既有用户的 `class_id`；即使改成 `update_or_create`，也不一定清理 applications/approvals。重复 smoke 会被唯一约束挡住。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3733:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3281:1. **Seed/mock修复：** 内容不完整。需要把 `--reset` 明确为 idempotent，并决定是否清理 applications/approvals；否则 smoke test 不能重复跑。Provider 方法名实际是 `check_status`，不是 `get_status`。模板路径不只 `docs/templates/`，还包括 `backend/data/templates/`。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3734:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3283:3. **状态机保护：** 必须覆盖 approve 和 reject。只校验重复审批不够，还要校验 step/status 匹配，例如 dean approval 不能在 `pending_counselor` 状态下被操作。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3737:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3935:+Claude列出的最小测试包括403、409、step/status mismatch、重复提交DB约束、正向路径。它们需要fixture、认证、申请创建、approval链路和状态准备。45分钟可能够写一个很薄的测试文件，但不够稳定调通这组测试。合理预算是60-90分钟；如果基线完全顺，60分钟有机会。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3764:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:5476:+Claude列出的最小测试包括403、409、step/status mismatch、重复提交DB约束、正向路径。它们需要fixture、认证、申请创建、approval链路和状态准备。45分钟可能够写一个很薄的测试文件，但不够稳定调通这组测试。合理预算是60-90分钟；如果基线完全顺，60分钟有机会。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3786:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:375:   - If duplicate event IDs detected, set `state.status = "needs_repair"`
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3791:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:512:The most important design correction is to make `events.jsonl` the source of truth and treat `state.json` as a rebuildable cache. The second correction is to define one serialized write path for shared files using atomic filesystem operations. These two changes solve most concurrency, recovery, and duplicate-id issues without adding a service, daemon, database, or cross-provider hook.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3792:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:518:This is a real issue, not just theoretical. The protocol says locks are advisory and says to use a lock when two agents might modify the same file, but it does not define an atomic acquisition operation, required write ordering, timeout, or validation step. If two agents append events and update state at the same time, `state.json` can point to the wrong event id, event ids can duplicate, and a later agent may silently build on corrupted state.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3793:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:595:- If duplicate ids exist, do not renumber historical events by default. Append an `event_log_repair` event with details and mark `state.status = "needs_repair"` unless the user explicitly approves log surgery.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3794:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:611:- If duplicate ids or malformed lines are detected, the agent MUST stop normal processing, preserve the original log, write a repair artifact, and set state status to `needs_repair`.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3801:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:704:If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed line or duplicate event id, normal collaboration MUST stop and `state.status` MUST be set to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely. A repair artifact MUST describe the malformed line, duplicate ids, proposed repair, and whether historical log rewriting is required.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:3841:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1474:+If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:72:2. **Mock 数据也和 Day 2 结论冲突。** [providers.py](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/backend/apps/applications/providers.py:25) 里 `2020002` 仍是 `pending`，不是 Day 2 文档声称的 `completed`。这会影响 T002 正向链路和列表验收。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:74:3. **smoke 脚本不可靠。** [tests/smoke_test.sh](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/tests/smoke_test.sh:175) 在 happy path 后又用同一个学生 `2020001` 创建第二个申请，但现在已有 `Application.student` 唯一约束，会触发重复提交。也就是说“负向验证”不能只是 Day 3 次要项，它是当前证据链修复项。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:82:- `GET /api/applications/`：学生看自己，辅导员看负责班级；Dean 默认只看与自己审批相关的申请。不要默认全量。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:95:- 最小 `GET /api/approvals/` + `GET /api/applications/`：60-90 分钟
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:103:1. 先修 Day 2 证据漂移：登录 URL、`2020002` mock、smoke 脚本重复提交。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:104:2. 实现最小待办接口：优先 `GET /api/approvals/`，再 `GET /api/applications/`。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:114:列表接口应作为 Day 3 主线，但必须降范围为“最小待办发现能力 + 权限隔离 + 可重复 smoke”。过滤/分页只做最小版，ClassMapping 不进主路径。当前提案按原样执行会把 Day 3 变成范围发散，而且会掩盖 Day 2 证据链已经漂移的问题。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:302:- If duplicate ids or malformed JSONL lines are detected, the agent MUST stop normal collaboration processing and follow the Failure Recovery rules.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:419:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:828:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1567:Day 2不应该加新功能，应该把"手工跑通"固化为"可重复验收"：
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:833:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1611:列表接口不应是可选。没有它，审批人不知道有哪些申请需要处理，Day 2仍然依赖“学生提交响应里带出的approval_id”或查库，不能称为可重复验收。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:834:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1614:- `GET /api/applications/`根据当前登录用户角色自动过滤，不依赖`role`查询参数授权。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:838:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1648:- 列表接口能让T002发现`2020002`的待办，D001发现学工部待办。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:908:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:2294:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:34:- 如果Day 2是硬4小时，只能定义为“P1止血版”：seed/mock、审批权限、状态机基础保护、重复提交约束、最小smoke骨架。不能宣称全部P1完成。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:909:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:2295:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:35:- 如果目标是“Day 2后可重复验收”，应预留**8-12小时**，或者拆成Day 2核心修复 + Day 3验收固化。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:910:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:2296:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:124:列表接口不应是可选。没有它，审批人不知道有哪些申请需要处理，Day 2仍然依赖“学生提交响应里带出的approval_id”或查库，不能称为可重复验收。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3232:- 如果Day 2是硬4小时，只能定义为“P1止血版”：seed/mock、审批权限、状态机基础保护、重复提交约束、最小smoke骨架。不能宣称全部P1完成。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3233:- 如果目标是“Day 2后可重复验收”，应预留**8-12小时**，或者拆成Day 2核心修复 + Day 3验收固化。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3241:1. **先恢复测试与数据基线。** 修`2020002`、Mock、CSV模板、测试fixtures，让T001/T002两条链路可构造。否则后续权限和smoke都没有可靠样本。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3243:3. **重复提交竞态。** 先做业务决策，再加数据库约束、迁移和异常处理。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3244:4. **列表接口。** 至少实现待办列表；否则“可重复验收”仍靠内部ID传递。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3261:- 同步修复`GET /api/applications/{id}/`查看权限。当前只限制学生，任何辅导员/学工部都可查看任意申请，这是同类权限漏洞。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3272:- counselor approve创建Dean approval前检查是否已经存在该application的Dean approval，避免并发重复创建。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3275:并发测试不能只用普通`TestCase`。SQLite下`select_for_update()`基本不能证明锁语义，应至少用`TransactionTestCase`覆盖重复请求返回409；真正并发正确性最好在Docker/Postgres环境跑集成测试。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3307:- 验证负向链路：`T001`不能审批`2020002`的approval；重复审批返回409；重复提交返回409；错误step/status返回409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3317:- 验收清单应引用`tests/smoke_test.sh`作为主验证入口，curl命令作为展开说明，而不是两套可能漂移的事实来源。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3322:列表接口不应是可选。没有它，审批人不知道有哪些申请需要处理，Day 2仍然依赖“学生提交响应里带出的approval_id”或查库，不能称为可重复验收。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3340:6. **approve/reject重复逻辑风险。** 两个函数权限、状态机、事务应抽成共享处理路径，避免只修approve漏掉reject。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3567:- 8-12小时是"完整关闭P1 + 可重复验收"的真实成本
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3658:- `seed_data --reset` 的语义是否包含清理 applications/approvals；否则加了"一人一申请"约束后 smoke test 不能重复跑。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3668:2. 权限、状态机、重复提交应作为一个一致性修复组推进，代码可以串行改，但验证要合并成一组回归。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3680:- 重复审批返回 409，且不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3682:- 重复提交由数据库唯一约束兜底，API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3685:理由：这些都是安全/一致性回归点，且仓库已经有 `backend/apps/*/tests/` 测试结构，新增针对性 Django 测试比后续靠人工复验可靠。`tests/smoke_test.sh` 可以作为端到端运行脚本，但不能替代模型/API层回归测试。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3695:- 状态机事务/锁/重复 dean 防护：90-120分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3696:- 重复提交数据库约束 + migration + IntegrityError：60-90分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3712:- 重复提交必须有数据库级约束，并且 API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3713:- 最低自动化测试和正向 smoke 至少有一个可重复执行证据链。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3721:- 共享权限函数的重构形式；只要 approve/reject 行为正确，可以 Day 3 清理重复代码。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3736:2. **reset语义风险。** `seed_data` 当前使用 `get_or_create`，不会更新既有用户的 `class_id`；即使改成 `update_or_create`，也不一定清理 applications/approvals。重复 smoke 会被唯一约束挡住。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3737:3. **数据库约束迁移风险。** 给 `Application.student` 加唯一约束前，需要确认测试库/开发库没有重复数据，并处理 migration 失败路径。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3738:4. **事务验证风险。** `select_for_update()` 需要在真实数据库事务中验证；如果只用普通 curl 串行验证，无法证明并发下不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3739:5. **端点与文档漂移风险。** 提案里的部分 curl 缺少尾斜杠，但当前 URL 是 `/api/applications/` 和 `/api/approvals/<id>/approve/`。文档还需同步 `app_...`/`apv_...` 这类实际ID格式，而不是简单写"UUID"。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3747:- **状态机保护 1小时偏乐观。** 事务、锁、状态匹配、重复 dean 防护、approve/reject 两条路径和测试至少需要 1.5-2小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3748:- **重复提交约束 30分钟偏乐观。** migration、历史数据、IntegrityError、事务包裹和测试至少 1小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3758:- 阶段1：Seed/mock/reset，且正向样本可重复提交验证。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3760:- 阶段3：审批状态机保护覆盖 approve/reject，且不会重复生成 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3761:- 阶段4：重复提交数据库级约束 + API 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3776:1. **Seed/mock修复：** 内容不完整。需要把 `--reset` 明确为 idempotent，并决定是否清理 applications/approvals；否则 smoke test 不能重复跑。Provider 方法名实际是 `check_status`，不是 `get_status`。模板路径不只 `docs/templates/`，还包括 `backend/data/templates/`。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3778:3. **状态机保护：** 必须覆盖 approve 和 reject。只校验重复审批不够，还要校验 step/status 匹配，例如 dean approval 不能在 `pending_counselor` 状态下被操作。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3779:4. **重复提交约束：** 必须保留数据库约束，不能只靠 `exists()`。需要 migration 和 IntegrityError 兜底；同时明确 MVP 是否允许 rejected 后重新提交。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:3789:- 状态机风险不只是语法不熟，而是事务边界、锁顺序、状态匹配和重复 dean 创建需要一起成立。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:5086:  File "/app/apps/applications/tests/test_error_cases.py", line 62, in test_conflict_duplicate_application
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:5175:2. **Mock 数据也和 Day 2 结论冲突。** [providers.py](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/backend/apps/applications/providers.py:25) 里 `2020002` 仍是 `pending`，不是 Day 2 文档声称的 `completed`。这会影响 T002 正向链路和列表验收。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:5177:3. **smoke 脚本不可靠。** [tests/smoke_test.sh](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/tests/smoke_test.sh:175) 在 happy path 后又用同一个学生 `2020001` 创建第二个申请，但现在已有 `Application.student` 唯一约束，会触发重复提交。也就是说“负向验证”不能只是 Day 3 次要项，它是当前证据链修复项。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:5185:- `GET /api/applications/`：学生看自己，辅导员看负责班级；Dean 默认只看与自己审批相关的申请。不要默认全量。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:5198:- 最小 `GET /api/approvals/` + `GET /api/applications/`：60-90 分钟
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:5206:1. 先修 Day 2 证据漂移：登录 URL、`2020002` mock、smoke 脚本重复提交。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:5207:2. 实现最小待办接口：优先 `GET /api/approvals/`，再 `GET /api/applications/`。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-day-3-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-01-cla-2026-05-30T16-00-18-381Z.md:5217:列表接口应作为 Day 3 主线，但必须降范围为“最小待办发现能力 + 权限隔离 + 可重复 smoke”。过滤/分页只做最小版，ClassMapping 不进主路径。当前提案按原样执行会把 Day 3 变成范围发散，而且会掩盖 Day 2 证据链已经漂移的问题。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-d-codex-d-state-transitions-9-info-events-9-valueerro-2026-05-30T15-29-49-586Z.md:576:- If duplicate ids or malformed JSONL lines are detected, the agent MUST stop normal collaboration processing and follow the Failure Recovery rules.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-d-codex-d-state-transitions-9-info-events-9-valueerro-2026-05-30T15-29-49-586Z.md:693:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:285:3. Stress test: rapid sequential writes, check for any duplicates (indirect)
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:744:[重复其他问题]
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:773:[重复其他问题]
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:927:The most important design correction is to make `events.jsonl` the source of truth and treat `state.json` as a rebuildable cache. The second correction is to define one serialized write path for shared files using atomic filesystem operations. These two changes solve most concurrency, recovery, and duplicate-id issues without adding a service, daemon, database, or cross-provider hook.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:933:This is a real issue, not just theoretical. The protocol says locks are advisory and says to use a lock when two agents might modify the same file, but it does not define an atomic acquisition operation, required write ordering, timeout, or validation step. If two agents append events and update state at the same time, `state.json` can point to the wrong event id, event ids can duplicate, and a later agent may silently build on corrupted state.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:1010:- If duplicate ids exist, do not renumber historical events by default. Append an `event_log_repair` event with details and mark `state.status = "needs_repair"` unless the user explicitly approves log surgery.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:1026:- If duplicate ids or malformed lines are detected, the agent MUST stop normal processing, preserve the original log, write a repair artifact, and set state status to `needs_repair`.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:1119:If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed line or duplicate event id, normal collaboration MUST stop and `state.status` MUST be set to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely. A repair artifact MUST describe the malformed line, duplicate ids, proposed repair, and whether historical log rewriting is required.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:1209:Goal: verify journal lock prevents duplicate event ids.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:1218:- Unsafe branch demonstrates duplicate ids or failed validation.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:1277:4. Define `needs_repair` behavior for malformed log or duplicate ids.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:1343:+The journal lock prevents corrupted appends and duplicate event ids, but it does not by itself make task ownership decisions atomic unless the decision is also made inside the same critical section. The failure mode is severe: the event log can remain valid while two agents both believe they own the same task. That breaks the central safety property of the collaboration protocol.
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:1432:+   - unsafe mode creates duplicate ids or validation failure;

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:74:   基本同意串行。但任务2-4不能当成可随意跳过的独立项，应作为“权限 + 状态机 + 重复提交”一致性修复组处理。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:77:   不同意只做手工验证。必须补最小 Django 自动化测试：跨辅导员 approve/reject 403、重复审批409、状态不匹配409、重复提交数据库约束409、正向路径仍通过。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:83:   不能按“超时50%就评估跳过”。不能跳过的包括 seed/mock/reset、assigned approver、状态机保护、重复提交数据库约束、最低自动化测试、正向 smoke 证据。列表接口、完整负向 smoke、ClassMapping 二次防御、并发压力测试可推 Day 3。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:1679:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:63:- 同步修复`GET /api/applications/{id}/`查看权限。当前只限制学生，任何辅导员/学工部都可查看任意申请，这是同类权限漏洞。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:1682:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:74:- counselor approve创建Dean approval前检查是否已经存在该application的Dean approval，避免并发重复创建。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:1689:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:109:- 验证负向链路：`T001`不能审批`2020002`的approval；重复审批返回409；重复提交返回409；错误step/status返回409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:1691:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:124:列表接口不应是可选。没有它，审批人不知道有哪些申请需要处理，Day 2仍然依赖“学生提交响应里带出的approval_id”或查库，不能称为可重复验收。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:1692:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:127:- `GET /api/applications/`根据当前登录用户角色自动过滤，不依赖`role`查询参数授权。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:1695:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:172:- 重复审批可改变状态或创建重复Dean approval。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3146:+- `seed_data --reset` 的语义是否包含清理 applications/approvals；否则加了"一人一申请"约束后 smoke test 不能重复跑。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3156:+2. 权限、状态机、重复提交应作为一个一致性修复组推进，代码可以串行改，但验证要合并成一组回归。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3168:+- 重复审批返回 409，且不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3170:+- 重复提交由数据库唯一约束兜底，API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3173:+理由：这些都是安全/一致性回归点，且仓库已经有 `backend/apps/*/tests/` 测试结构，新增针对性 Django 测试比后续靠人工复验可靠。`tests/smoke_test.sh` 可以作为端到端运行脚本，但不能替代模型/API层回归测试。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3183:+- 状态机事务/锁/重复 dean 防护：90-120分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3184:+- 重复提交数据库约束 + migration + IntegrityError：60-90分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3200:+- 重复提交必须有数据库级约束，并且 API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3201:+- 最低自动化测试和正向 smoke 至少有一个可重复执行证据链。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3209:+- 共享权限函数的重构形式；只要 approve/reject 行为正确，可以 Day 3 清理重复代码。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3224:+2. **reset语义风险。** `seed_data` 当前使用 `get_or_create`，不会更新既有用户的 `class_id`；即使改成 `update_or_create`，也不一定清理 applications/approvals。重复 smoke 会被唯一约束挡住。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3225:+3. **数据库约束迁移风险。** 给 `Application.student` 加唯一约束前，需要确认测试库/开发库没有重复数据，并处理 migration 失败路径。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3226:+4. **事务验证风险。** `select_for_update()` 需要在真实数据库事务中验证；如果只用普通 curl 串行验证，无法证明并发下不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3227:+5. **端点与文档漂移风险。** 提案里的部分 curl 缺少尾斜杠，但当前 URL 是 `/api/applications/` 和 `/api/approvals/<id>/approve/`。文档还需同步 `app_...`/`apv_...` 这类实际ID格式，而不是简单写"UUID"。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3235:+- **状态机保护 1小时偏乐观。** 事务、锁、状态匹配、重复 dean 防护、approve/reject 两条路径和测试至少需要 1.5-2小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3236:+- **重复提交约束 30分钟偏乐观。** migration、历史数据、IntegrityError、事务包裹和测试至少 1小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3246:+- 阶段1：Seed/mock/reset，且正向样本可重复提交验证。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3248:+- 阶段3：审批状态机保护覆盖 approve/reject，且不会重复生成 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3249:+- 阶段4：重复提交数据库级约束 + API 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3264:+1. **Seed/mock修复：** 内容不完整。需要把 `--reset` 明确为 idempotent，并决定是否清理 applications/approvals；否则 smoke test 不能重复跑。Provider 方法名实际是 `check_status`，不是 `get_status`。模板路径不只 `docs/templates/`，还包括 `backend/data/templates/`。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3266:+3. **状态机保护：** 必须覆盖 approve 和 reject。只校验重复审批不够，还要校验 step/status 匹配，例如 dean approval 不能在 `pending_counselor` 状态下被操作。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3267:+4. **重复提交约束：** 必须保留数据库约束，不能只靠 `exists()`。需要 migration 和 IntegrityError 兜底；同时明确 MVP 是否允许 rejected 后重新提交。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3277:+- 状态机风险不只是语法不熟，而是事务边界、锁顺序、状态匹配和重复 dean 创建需要一起成立。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3289:+2. **0:30-1:15 数据复位与seed/mock：** 完成 `--reset`、2020002/T002链路、provider和模板同步。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3322:+- `seed_data --reset` 的语义是否包含清理 applications/approvals；否则加了"一人一申请"约束后 smoke test 不能重复跑。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3332:+2. 权限、状态机、重复提交应作为一个一致性修复组推进，代码可以串行改，但验证要合并成一组回归。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3344:+- 重复审批返回 409，且不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3346:+- 重复提交由数据库唯一约束兜底，API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3349:+理由：这些都是安全/一致性回归点，且仓库已经有 `backend/apps/*/tests/` 测试结构，新增针对性 Django 测试比后续靠人工复验可靠。`tests/smoke_test.sh` 可以作为端到端运行脚本，但不能替代模型/API层回归测试。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3359:+- 状态机事务/锁/重复 dean 防护：90-120分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3360:+- 重复提交数据库约束 + migration + IntegrityError：60-90分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3376:+- 重复提交必须有数据库级约束，并且 API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3377:+- 最低自动化测试和正向 smoke 至少有一个可重复执行证据链。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3385:+- 共享权限函数的重构形式；只要 approve/reject 行为正确，可以 Day 3 清理重复代码。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3400:+2. **reset语义风险。** `seed_data` 当前使用 `get_or_create`，不会更新既有用户的 `class_id`；即使改成 `update_or_create`，也不一定清理 applications/approvals。重复 smoke 会被唯一约束挡住。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3401:+3. **数据库约束迁移风险。** 给 `Application.student` 加唯一约束前，需要确认测试库/开发库没有重复数据，并处理 migration 失败路径。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3402:+4. **事务验证风险。** `select_for_update()` 需要在真实数据库事务中验证；如果只用普通 curl 串行验证，无法证明并发下不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3403:+5. **端点与文档漂移风险。** 提案里的部分 curl 缺少尾斜杠，但当前 URL 是 `/api/applications/` 和 `/api/approvals/<id>/approve/`。文档还需同步 `app_...`/`apv_...` 这类实际ID格式，而不是简单写"UUID"。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3411:+- **状态机保护 1小时偏乐观。** 事务、锁、状态匹配、重复 dean 防护、approve/reject 两条路径和测试至少需要 1.5-2小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3412:+- **重复提交约束 30分钟偏乐观。** migration、历史数据、IntegrityError、事务包裹和测试至少 1小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3422:+- 阶段1：Seed/mock/reset，且正向样本可重复提交验证。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3424:+- 阶段3：审批状态机保护覆盖 approve/reject，且不会重复生成 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3425:+- 阶段4：重复提交数据库级约束 + API 409。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3826:{"id":48,"type":"review_response","agent":"codex","timestamp":"2026-05-30T14:28:18.048660Z","summary":"Codex reviewed Claude Day 2 execution strategy and recommended preflight, mandatory tests, and stricter no-skip gates.","task_id":"TASK-20260530-06","artifacts":["docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/09-codex-day2-execution-review.md"],"status":"waiting","details":{"score":"6/10","must_not_skip":["seed/mock/reset","assigned approver authorization","state machine protection","duplicate submission db constraint","minimum automated tests","positive smoke evidence"]}}
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3853:+- `seed_data --reset` 的语义是否包含清理 applications/approvals；否则加了"一人一申请"约束后 smoke test 不能重复跑。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3863:+2. 权限、状态机、重复提交应作为一个一致性修复组推进，代码可以串行改，但验证要合并成一组回归。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3875:+- 重复审批返回 409，且不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3877:+- 重复提交由数据库唯一约束兜底，API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3880:+理由：这些都是安全/一致性回归点，且仓库已经有 `backend/apps/*/tests/` 测试结构，新增针对性 Django 测试比后续靠人工复验可靠。`tests/smoke_test.sh` 可以作为端到端运行脚本，但不能替代模型/API层回归测试。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3890:+- 状态机事务/锁/重复 dean 防护：90-120分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3891:+- 重复提交数据库约束 + migration + IntegrityError：60-90分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3907:+- 重复提交必须有数据库级约束，并且 API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3908:+- 最低自动化测试和正向 smoke 至少有一个可重复执行证据链。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3916:+- 共享权限函数的重构形式；只要 approve/reject 行为正确，可以 Day 3 清理重复代码。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3931:+2. **reset语义风险。** `seed_data` 当前使用 `get_or_create`，不会更新既有用户的 `class_id`；即使改成 `update_or_create`，也不一定清理 applications/approvals。重复 smoke 会被唯一约束挡住。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3932:+3. **数据库约束迁移风险。** 给 `Application.student` 加唯一约束前，需要确认测试库/开发库没有重复数据，并处理 migration 失败路径。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3933:+4. **事务验证风险。** `select_for_update()` 需要在真实数据库事务中验证；如果只用普通 curl 串行验证，无法证明并发下不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3934:+5. **端点与文档漂移风险。** 提案里的部分 curl 缺少尾斜杠，但当前 URL 是 `/api/applications/` 和 `/api/approvals/<id>/approve/`。文档还需同步 `app_...`/`apv_...` 这类实际ID格式，而不是简单写"UUID"。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3942:+- **状态机保护 1小时偏乐观。** 事务、锁、状态匹配、重复 dean 防护、approve/reject 两条路径和测试至少需要 1.5-2小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3943:+- **重复提交约束 30分钟偏乐观。** migration、历史数据、IntegrityError、事务包裹和测试至少 1小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3953:+- 阶段1：Seed/mock/reset，且正向样本可重复提交验证。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3955:+- 阶段3：审批状态机保护覆盖 approve/reject，且不会重复生成 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3956:+- 阶段4：重复提交数据库级约束 + API 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3971:+1. **Seed/mock修复：** 内容不完整。需要把 `--reset` 明确为 idempotent，并决定是否清理 applications/approvals；否则 smoke test 不能重复跑。Provider 方法名实际是 `check_status`，不是 `get_status`。模板路径不只 `docs/templates/`，还包括 `backend/data/templates/`。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3973:+3. **状态机保护：** 必须覆盖 approve 和 reject。只校验重复审批不够，还要校验 step/status 匹配，例如 dean approval 不能在 `pending_counselor` 状态下被操作。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3974:+4. **重复提交约束：** 必须保留数据库约束，不能只靠 `exists()`。需要 migration 和 IntegrityError 兜底；同时明确 MVP 是否允许 rejected 后重新提交。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3984:+- 状态机风险不只是语法不熟，而是事务边界、锁顺序、状态匹配和重复 dean 创建需要一起成立。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:3996:+2. **0:30-1:15 数据复位与seed/mock：** 完成 `--reset`、2020002/T002链路、provider和模板同步。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4031:+- `seed_data --reset` 的语义是否包含清理 applications/approvals；否则加了"一人一申请"约束后 smoke test 不能重复跑。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4041:+2. 权限、状态机、重复提交应作为一个一致性修复组推进，代码可以串行改，但验证要合并成一组回归。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4346:+5. **端点与文档漂移风险。** 提案里的部分 curl 缺少尾斜杠，但当前 URL 是 `/api/applications/` 和 `/api/approvals/<id>/approve/`。文档还需同步 `app_...`/`apv_...` 这类实际ID格式，而不是简单写"UUID"。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4354:+- **状态机保护 1小时偏乐观。** 事务、锁、状态匹配、重复 dean 防护、approve/reject 两条路径和测试至少需要 1.5-2小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4355:+- **重复提交约束 30分钟偏乐观。** migration、历史数据、IntegrityError、事务包裹和测试至少 1小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4365:+- 阶段1：Seed/mock/reset，且正向样本可重复提交验证。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4367:+- 阶段3：审批状态机保护覆盖 approve/reject，且不会重复生成 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4368:+- 阶段4：重复提交数据库级约束 + API 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4383:+1. **Seed/mock修复：** 内容不完整。需要把 `--reset` 明确为 idempotent，并决定是否清理 applications/approvals；否则 smoke test 不能重复跑。Provider 方法名实际是 `check_status`，不是 `get_status`。模板路径不只 `docs/templates/`，还包括 `backend/data/templates/`。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4385:+3. **状态机保护：** 必须覆盖 approve 和 reject。只校验重复审批不够，还要校验 step/status 匹配，例如 dean approval 不能在 `pending_counselor` 状态下被操作。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4386:+4. **重复提交约束：** 必须保留数据库约束，不能只靠 `exists()`。需要 migration 和 IntegrityError 兜底；同时明确 MVP 是否允许 rejected 后重新提交。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4396:+- 状态机风险不只是语法不熟，而是事务边界、锁顺序、状态匹配和重复 dean 创建需要一起成立。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4408:+2. **0:30-1:15 数据复位与seed/mock：** 完成 `--reset`、2020002/T002链路、provider和模板同步。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4434:  +{"id":48,"type":"review_response","agent":"codex","timestamp":"2026-05-30T14:28:18.048660Z","summary":"Codex reviewed Claude Day 2 execution strategy and recommended preflight, mandatory tests, and stricter no-skip gates.","task_id":"TASK-20260530-06","artifacts":["docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/09-codex-day2-execution-review.md"],"status":"waiting","details":{"score":"6/10","must_not_skip":["seed/mock/reset","assigned approver authorization","state machine protection","duplicate submission db constraint","minimum automated tests","positive smoke evidence"]}}
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4454:{"id":48,"type":"review_response","agent":"codex","timestamp":"2026-05-30T14:28:18.048660Z","summary":"Codex reviewed Claude Day 2 execution strategy and recommended preflight, mandatory tests, and stricter no-skip gates.","task_id":"TASK-20260530-06","artifacts":["docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/09-codex-day2-execution-review.md"],"status":"waiting","details":{"score":"6/10","must_not_skip":["seed/mock/reset","assigned approver authorization","state machine protection","duplicate submission db constraint","minimum automated tests","positive smoke evidence"]}}
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4494:+- `seed_data --reset` 的语义是否包含清理 applications/approvals；否则加了"一人一申请"约束后 smoke test 不能重复跑。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4504:+2. 权限、状态机、重复提交应作为一个一致性修复组推进，代码可以串行改，但验证要合并成一组回归。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4516:+- 重复审批返回 409，且不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4518:+- 重复提交由数据库唯一约束兜底，API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4521:+理由：这些都是安全/一致性回归点，且仓库已经有 `backend/apps/*/tests/` 测试结构，新增针对性 Django 测试比后续靠人工复验可靠。`tests/smoke_test.sh` 可以作为端到端运行脚本，但不能替代模型/API层回归测试。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4531:+- 状态机事务/锁/重复 dean 防护：90-120分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4532:+- 重复提交数据库约束 + migration + IntegrityError：60-90分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4548:+- 重复提交必须有数据库级约束，并且 API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4549:+- 最低自动化测试和正向 smoke 至少有一个可重复执行证据链。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4557:+- 共享权限函数的重构形式；只要 approve/reject 行为正确，可以 Day 3 清理重复代码。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4572:+2. **reset语义风险。** `seed_data` 当前使用 `get_or_create`，不会更新既有用户的 `class_id`；即使改成 `update_or_create`，也不一定清理 applications/approvals。重复 smoke 会被唯一约束挡住。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4573:+3. **数据库约束迁移风险。** 给 `Application.student` 加唯一约束前，需要确认测试库/开发库没有重复数据，并处理 migration 失败路径。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4574:+4. **事务验证风险。** `select_for_update()` 需要在真实数据库事务中验证；如果只用普通 curl 串行验证，无法证明并发下不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4575:+5. **端点与文档漂移风险。** 提案里的部分 curl 缺少尾斜杠，但当前 URL 是 `/api/applications/` 和 `/api/approvals/<id>/approve/`。文档还需同步 `app_...`/`apv_...` 这类实际ID格式，而不是简单写"UUID"。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4583:+- **状态机保护 1小时偏乐观。** 事务、锁、状态匹配、重复 dean 防护、approve/reject 两条路径和测试至少需要 1.5-2小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4584:+- **重复提交约束 30分钟偏乐观。** migration、历史数据、IntegrityError、事务包裹和测试至少 1小时。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4847:+4. **重复提交约束：** 必须保留数据库约束，不能只靠 `exists()`。需要 migration 和 IntegrityError 兜底；同时明确 MVP 是否允许 rejected 后重新提交。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4857:+- 状态机风险不只是语法不熟，而是事务边界、锁顺序、状态匹配和重复 dean 创建需要一起成立。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4869:+2. **0:30-1:15 数据复位与seed/mock：** 完成 `--reset`、2020002/T002链路、provider和模板同步。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4888:   基本同意串行。但任务2-4不能当成可随意跳过的独立项，应作为“权限 + 状态机 + 重复提交”一致性修复组处理。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4891:   不同意只做手工验证。必须补最小 Django 自动化测试：跨辅导员 approve/reject 403、重复审批409、状态不匹配409、重复提交数据库约束409、正向路径仍通过。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4897:   不能按“超时50%就评估跳过”。不能跳过的包括 seed/mock/reset、assigned approver、状态机保护、重复提交数据库约束、最低自动化测试、正向 smoke 证据。列表接口、完整负向 smoke、ClassMapping 二次防御、并发压力测试可推 Day 3。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4927:+- `seed_data --reset` 的语义是否包含清理 applications/approvals；否则加了"一人一申请"约束后 smoke test 不能重复跑。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4937:+2. 权限、状态机、重复提交应作为一个一致性修复组推进，代码可以串行改，但验证要合并成一组回归。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4949:+- 重复审批返回 409，且不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4951:+- 重复提交由数据库唯一约束兜底，API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4954:+理由：这些都是安全/一致性回归点，且仓库已经有 `backend/apps/*/tests/` 测试结构，新增针对性 Django 测试比后续靠人工复验可靠。`tests/smoke_test.sh` 可以作为端到端运行脚本，但不能替代模型/API层回归测试。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4964:+- 状态机事务/锁/重复 dean 防护：90-120分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4965:+- 重复提交数据库约束 + migration + IntegrityError：60-90分钟。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4981:+- 重复提交必须有数据库级约束，并且 API 返回 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4982:+- 最低自动化测试和正向 smoke 至少有一个可重复执行证据链。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:4990:+- 共享权限函数的重构形式；只要 approve/reject 行为正确，可以 Day 3 清理重复代码。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5005:+2. **reset语义风险。** `seed_data` 当前使用 `get_or_create`，不会更新既有用户的 `class_id`；即使改成 `update_or_create`，也不一定清理 applications/approvals。重复 smoke 会被唯一约束挡住。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5006:+3. **数据库约束迁移风险。** 给 `Application.student` 加唯一约束前，需要确认测试库/开发库没有重复数据，并处理 migration 失败路径。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5007:+4. **事务验证风险。** `select_for_update()` 需要在真实数据库事务中验证；如果只用普通 curl 串行验证，无法证明并发下不会重复创建 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5008:+5. **端点与文档漂移风险。** 提案里的部分 curl 缺少尾斜杠，但当前 URL 是 `/api/applications/` 和 `/api/approvals/<id>/approve/`。文档还需同步 `app_...`/`apv_...` 这类实际ID格式，而不是简单写"UUID"。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5016:+- **状态机保护 1小时偏乐观。** 事务、锁、状态匹配、重复 dean 防护、approve/reject 两条路径和测试至少需要 1.5-2小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5017:+- **重复提交约束 30分钟偏乐观。** migration、历史数据、IntegrityError、事务包裹和测试至少 1小时。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5027:+- 阶段1：Seed/mock/reset，且正向样本可重复提交验证。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5029:+- 阶段3：审批状态机保护覆盖 approve/reject，且不会重复生成 dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5030:+- 阶段4：重复提交数据库级约束 + API 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5045:+1. **Seed/mock修复：** 内容不完整。需要把 `--reset` 明确为 idempotent，并决定是否清理 applications/approvals；否则 smoke test 不能重复跑。Provider 方法名实际是 `check_status`，不是 `get_status`。模板路径不只 `docs/templates/`，还包括 `backend/data/templates/`。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5047:+3. **状态机保护：** 必须覆盖 approve 和 reject。只校验重复审批不够，还要校验 step/status 匹配，例如 dean approval 不能在 `pending_counselor` 状态下被操作。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5048:+4. **重复提交约束：** 必须保留数据库约束，不能只靠 `exists()`。需要 migration 和 IntegrityError 兜底；同时明确 MVP 是否允许 rejected 后重新提交。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5058:+- 状态机风险不只是语法不熟，而是事务边界、锁顺序、状态匹配和重复 dean 创建需要一起成立。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T14-29-49-229Z.md:5070:+2. **0:30-1:15 数据复位与seed/mock：** 完成 `--reset`、2020002/T002链路、provider和模板同步。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-docs-discussions-codex-review-2026-05-30-41-next-steps-criti-2026-05-30T07-26-56-594Z.md:32:4. Mock 数据够吗？100学生/10辅导员只够演示，不够测试。需要 fixture matrix：无班级、重复学号、辅导员停用、多班级、非毕业生、延期、宿舍 API 401/404/429/500/timeout。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:1093:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. ../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1229:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:34:- 如果Day 2是硬4小时，只能定义为“P1止血版”：seed/mock、审批权限、状态机基础保护、重复提交约束、最小smoke骨架。不能宣称全部P1完成。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1230:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:35:- 如果目标是“Day 2后可重复验收”，应预留**8-12小时**，或者拆成Day 2核心修复 + Day 3验收固化。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1231:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:43:1. **先恢复测试与数据基线。** 修`2020002`、Mock、CSV模板、测试fixtures，让T001/T002两条链路可构造。否则后续权限和smoke都没有可靠样本。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1232:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:46:4. **列表接口。** 至少实现待办列表；否则“可重复验收”仍靠内部ID传递。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1239:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:79:### P1-3 重复提交竞态
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1245:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:119:- 验收清单应引用`tests/smoke_test.sh`作为主验证入口，curl命令作为展开说明，而不是两套可能漂移的事实来源。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1248:docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/04-codex-day2-plan-review.md:124:列表接口不应是可选。没有它，审批人不知道有哪些申请需要处理，Day 2仍然依赖“学生提交响应里带出的approval_id”或查库，不能称为可重复验收。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1595:- 验证正向链路：`2020002`提交后由`T002`审批，再由`D001`审批，最终状态`approved`。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1596:- 验证负向链路：`T001`不能审批`2020002`的approval；重复审批返回409；重复提交返回409；错误step/status返回409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1606:- 验收清单应引用`tests/smoke_test.sh`作为主验证入口，curl命令作为展开说明，而不是两套可能漂移的事实来源。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1611:列表接口不应是可选。没有它，审批人不知道有哪些申请需要处理，Day 2仍然依赖“学生提交响应里带出的approval_id”或查库，不能称为可重复验收。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1614:- `GET /api/applications/`根据当前登录用户角色自动过滤，不依赖`role`查询参数授权。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1627:4. **迁移成本未估算。** Application唯一约束、Approval唯一约束都需要migration，并要考虑已有重复数据如何处理。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1629:6. **approve/reject重复逻辑风险。** 两个函数权限、状态机、事务应抽成共享处理路径，避免只修approve漏掉reject。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:1645:- 核心Django测试通过，至少覆盖申请、审批、驳回、权限、重复提交。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:2970:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T10-09-06-045Z.md:1880:还有一个重要发现：当前 `create_application` 依赖 `ClassMapping`，但已有测试 setUp 里没有创建映射；Day 2如果承诺“代码+测试+可重复验收”，可能需要先修测试基础而不是只加新断言。ನ
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:2972:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T10-09-06-045Z.md:1985:+- 如果Day 2是硬4小时，只能定义为“P1止血版”：seed/mock、审批权限、状态机基础保护、重复提交约束、最小smoke骨架。不能宣称全部P1完成。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:2973:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-day-2-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-0-2026-05-30T10-09-06-045Z.md:1986:+- 如果目标是“Day 2后可重复验收”，应预留**8-12小时**，或者拆成Day 2核心修复 + Day 3验收固化。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-17-claude-next-2026-05-30T15-17-01-336Z.md:64:   17 号列了环境、seed、测试、检查点模糊等问题，但没有吸收 14 号已经明确指出的关键风险：脏工作树、`docker compose exec backend` vs `docker exec backend`、`seed_data --reset` 不存在、重复提交缺数据库约束、审批状态机缺事务/锁、`get_application` 角色泄漏、migration dry-run 缺失：[14-codex-day2-launch-review.md](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/docs/discussions/week3-day1-review-2026-05-30/14-codex-day2-launch-review.md:67)。

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-17-claude-next-2026-05-30T15-17-01-336Z.md:1524:如果“立即启动”指完全跳过环境、基线、执行者授权确认，评分降为 **5/10**。原因是当前仍有会污染 Day 2 结论的前提未确认，包括工作树基线、Docker/DB状态、测试基线、`seed_data --reset` 是否存在、以及 migration 是否能承载重复提交约束。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-17-claude-next-2026-05-30T15-17-01-336Z.md:1557:3. **数据重置边界：** `seed_data --reset` 可以清理哪些表，尤其是 `applications` 和 `approvals`。这是重复提交约束和可重复 smoke 的前提。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-17-claude-next-2026-05-30T15-17-01-336Z.md:1563:1. **测试文件具体命名。** 可以新建 `test_permissions.py` / `test_state_machine.py`，也可以扩展现有测试文件，关键是覆盖点和可重复运行。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-17-claude-next-2026-05-30T15-17-01-336Z.md:1566:4. **smoke形式。** shell脚本、curl命令记录或最薄端到端脚本均可，但必须留下可重复证据。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-17-claude-next-2026-05-30T15-17-01-336Z.md:1582:   `backend/apps/users/management/commands/seed_data.py` 没有 `add_arguments`，也没有 reset 清理；`2020002` 当前仍是 `CS2020-01`，不是计划期望的 `CS2020-02`。这应作为 Day 2第一阶段实修项，不应再讨论。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-17-claude-next-2026-05-30T15-17-01-336Z.md:1584:4. **High - 重复提交只有API级检查，没有数据库级约束。**

../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3481:- ✗ 重复提交仍可创建多条记录
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3488:- 8-12小时是"完整关闭P1 + 可重复验收"的真实成本
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3840:+> 4.5小时内争取完成核心代码修复和至少一种可重复证据；到点检查是否值得继续使用剩余1.5小时补测试、smoke和文档。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3856:+   - 权限、状态机、重复提交的代码修复已基本落地；
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3864:+   - 最低自动化测试或正向smoke至少一个可重复证据链通过；
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3870:+   - 重复审批仍能改变状态或重复创建dean approval；
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3871:+   - 重复提交仍能创建多条申请；
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3872:+   - seed/reset不可重复，导致后续证据不可复现；
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3873:+   - 没有任何可重复验证证据。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3883:+- **会污染结论的问题**：`seed_data --reset`不清理applications/approvals、唯一约束migration因重复数据失败。这些不能简单归为遗留，因为会直接破坏重复验证，必须在Day 2处理或明确No-Go。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3931:+权限、`get_application`、dynamic dean、approve/reject状态机、事务、重复dean防护、唯一约束、IntegrityError处理放在1.5小时内，只有在代码结构非常顺、migration无历史数据问题、测试暂不跟进时才可能完成。更现实是2小时左右。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3935:+Claude列出的最小测试包括403、409、step/status mismatch、重复提交DB约束、正向路径。它们需要fixture、认证、申请创建、approval链路和状态准备。45分钟可能够写一个很薄的测试文件，但不够稳定调通这组测试。合理预算是60-90分钟；如果基线完全顺，60分钟有机会。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3958:+这不是完美主义，而是避免假阳性。一个没有可重复证据的Conditional Go，会把风险转移到Week 3，并让Day 3变成隐性返工。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3978:+- T001/T002两条链路必须可重复生成。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3987:+- 防重复dean approval。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3988:+- Application重复提交数据库约束和API 409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:3992:+- 优先覆盖跨辅导员403、重复审批409、重复提交409。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:4001:+- 至少一个可重复验证方向已跑通或接近跑通；
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:4029:+4. **Day 3只允许收尾明确项目。** 如果Day 2剩余的是核心权限、状态机、重复提交这些未闭合问题，Day 3是P0修复日，不是进入Week 3前的普通补充。
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:4040:+Claude说“测试/smoke未完成但核心安全项完成，可Conditional Go with Day 3 plan”，我的回答是：**这应改名为Day 3 P0 Follow-up，不应叫Conditional Go。Conditional Go至少需要一个可重复证据链。**
../.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-10-clau-2026-05-30T14-36-35-991Z.md:4119:+> 4.5小时内争取完成核心代码修复和至少一种可重复证据；到点检查是否值得继续使用剩余1.5小时补测试、smoke和文档。
